text:
Makefile changed:

Changed in Makefile for all ${PORTNAME}

Removed unsafe Script pycadia.sh


New Options for Makefile

SUB_FILES=	${PORTNAME}.sh

.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDATA}

.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}

Added file(s):
- files/pycadia.sh.in

Must use Name pycadia.sh.in not pycadia.in why is Work directory pycadia.
